title.comment: Title of the confirmation dialog when moving a folder

messageX.source: Move folder "{{name}}" and all its contents to "{{dest}}"?
messageX.comment: Confirmation message when moving a folder, interpolated with folder name and destination
messageX.es: ¿Mover la carpeta "{{name}}" y todo su contenido a "{{dest}}"?
messageX.fr-ca: Déplacer le dossier "{{name}}" et tout son contenu vers "{{dest}}" ?
